metadata.description: hotwire-codex-skills — unofficial skillset inspired by The Rails and Hotwire Codex (Ayush Newatia); skills + runnable checkers for Rails + Hotwire apps shipping to web/PWA, iOS, and Android.

plugins.name: hotwire-codex-skills
plugins.description: Eight verified skills with CI-runnable linters: Hotwire Native bridge + path config, Rails 7→8 upgrade (LazyRouteSet flake detector), Turbo 8 morphing, Turbo Frames (dangling-target / duplicate-id linter), targeted Turbo Streams (eavesdrop linter), token-backed session auth (security audit), and Turbo-safe Stimulus patterns.
